LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT MOZEL NEALY JR.'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED TO THE EXTENT THAT JUDGMENT DEBTOR CAN AFFORD AND SHOULD PAY $50 PER MONTH TOWARDS THE DEBT. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO GARNISH $50.00 PER MONTH AND TO RELEASE ANY FUNDS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-19-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Defendant MOZEL NEALY, Tel No. 415-425-8513 appearing in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court determines that Defendant Mr. Nealy did not provide the Court or the opposing side with proper notice regarding his intent to appear today to contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS ASSIGNEE OF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A./ORCHARD BANK'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption, Defendant MOZEL NEALY, JR. AKA MOZEL NEALY is Denied. Defendant has not met the burden to show that the source of the funds are from social security. Proceeds of the sale of the auto are not subject to exemption. Court shall sign and send a formal order to parties and the Sheriff's Office. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hrg On Claim Of Exemption; Notice
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MOZEL NEALY JR.'S Claim Of Exemption is denied to the extent that judgment debtor can afford and should pay $50 per month towards the debt. The levying officer is directed to garnish $50.00 per month and to release any funds held to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment. Order signed. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
